1000694523.english: - While strolling leisurely along the beach after breakfast, I saw Steel Line members swimming diligently since morning.
1000694523.korean: - 아침을 먹고 느긋하게 해변을 산책하던 도중, 스틸라인 대원들이 아침부터 열심히 헤엄을 치고 있는 모습이 보였다.

1000694527.english: I don't think I can go any further…!

1000694528.english: You're far from done! The men I've seen aren't ones who would collapse here!
1000694528.korean: 아직 멀었다! 내가 본 제군들은 여기서 무너질 이들이 아니다!

1000694529.english: Leprechaun! How do you expect to win first place at that pace?
1000694529.korean: 레프리콘! 그렇게 느려서 어떻게 1등을 차지하겠다는 거지?

1000694531.english: Don't even have the strength to answer? Want to rest a bit?
1000694531.korean: 대답할 힘도 없는 건가? 좀 쉬고 싶은 건가?

1000694535.english: - …Are they doing special training with Marie for the swimming competition? They're working so hard…
1000694535.korean: - …수영 대회를 대비해서 마리와 특훈을 하는 건가? 엄청 열심히 하네…

1000694536.english: - As I thought that and watched the training, I couldn't believe my eyes at who was swimming at the front of the formation.
1000694536.korean: - 그렇게 생각하며 특훈을 지켜보던 나는, 선두에서 헤엄치고 있는 사람을 보고 눈을 의심할 수밖에 없었다.

1000694537.english: - Leading the group was none other than…
1000694537.korean: - 대열의 선두에서 헤엄치고 있는 건, 바로…

1000694539.english: No one stop me…! I must… I must…!

1000694540.english: I must win first place… and get discharged…!

1000694541.english: - Efreeti swimming that desperately? What on earth is going on?
1000694541.korean: - 이프리트가 저렇게 열심히 수영을 하다니, 대체 무슨 일이지?

1000694542.english: - And saying she'll get discharged by winning first place—what's that supposed to mean?
1000694542.korean: - 그리고… 1등해서 전역을 하겠다니, 그건 또 무슨 소리야?

1000694543.english: - Clearly, something huge was going on behind my back without me knowing.
1000694543.korean: - 아무래도 뭔가 내가 모르는 사이 엄청난 일이 진행되고 있는 것 같았다.

1000694544.english: - I went around trying to figure out the situation, but…
1000694544.korean: - 나는 이 상황을 파악하기 위해 여기저기 돌아다녔지만…

1000694546.english: So, Undine, do you think Neri will win first place?
1000694546.korean: 어때, 운디네? 네리 일등 할 것 같아?

1000694547.english: …She's super fast… Neri, have you just been swimming this whole time?
1000694547.korean: …엄청 빠르다... 네리, 그 동안 수영만 하고 있었어?

1000694548.english: Hehe, Neri recently made a swimming club, right? So I practiced a lot during breaks.
1000694548.korean: 헤헤, 네리가 최근에 수영부 만들었잖아. 그래서 쉬는 시간에 많이 연습했지.

1000694549.english: At this pace, you really could win first place.
1000694549.korean: 이 정도면 정말 1등 할 수 있겠는데?

1000694551.english: If you win first place, what will you ask the Commander for?

1000694553.english: A secret between Neri and the Commander!

1000694554.english: Ah! Don't run away! Neri! I still need to check your time!
1000694554.korean: 앗! 도망가지 마! 네리! 나도 시간 체크해 줘야지!

1000694556.english: - Before I could even ask questions, Neri and Undine were already gone…
1000694556.korean: - 미처 질문을 하기도 전에 사라져버린 네리와 운디네는 물론이고…

1000694561.english: It's a little faster than last time!

1000694562.english: Hooh, it was already quite fast before, and now you're even faster…
1000694562.korean: 호오, 저번에도 상당히 빨랐는데, 거기에서 더 빨라졌다니…

1000694563.english: If you keep practicing like this, first place is possible.

1000694564.english: Yes, the likely winners are still Galatea or Alcyone, but…
1000694564.korean: 네, 유력한 우승후보라면 역시 갈라테아나 알키오네겠지만…

1000694565.english: I can't just give up without even trying.
1000694565.korean: 시도도 안 해보고 포기할 수야 없죠.

1000694566.english: Alright, now it's your turn, Shia.

1000694567.english: Okay! It'd be great if Shia and big sis could both win first place together.

1000694569.english: - Even Amphitrite and Salacia, whom I had counted on, were absorbed in swim practice, so it wasn't easy to grasp the situation.
1000694569.korean: - 믿었던 엠피트리테와 살라시아마저 수영 연습에 매진하는 중인지라, 상황을 파악하기가 쉽지 않았다.

1000694570.english: - As expected, in times like this, the person to ask would be…
1000694570.korean: - 역시, 이럴 때 물어볼 만한 사람은 아무래도…

1000694571.english: …Huh? Why is everyone so fired up, you ask?

1000694572.english: That's… of course it's because of the first-place prize in the swimming competition.
1000694572.korean: 그건… 당연히 수영 대회 1등 상품 때문이죠.

1000694573.english: Yes. Didn't you, Master, set the first-place prize as a wish coupon that would grant anything?
1000694573.korean: 네. 인간님이 1등 상품으로 무엇이든 다 들어주는 소원권을 거셨잖아요?

1000694575.english: So that's why everyone is working so hard to get the coupon.
1000694575.korean: 그래서 다들 소원권을 얻으려고 저렇게 열심히 하는 거예요.

1000694576.english: After all, their rivals are the Mermaid and Horizon members, right? And besides, Miss Alcyone is an orca Bioroid…
1000694576.korean: 아무래도, 경쟁 상대가 머메이드랑 호라이즌 대원들이잖아요? 게다가 알키오네 씨는 범고래 바이오로이드고…

1000694577.english: So everyone asked Sister Marie to give them hell training, and that's why they're pushing themselves so hard.
1000694577.korean: 그래서 다들 마리 언니보고 지옥 훈련을 시켜달라고 얘기해서, 저렇게 열심히 하는 거예요.

1000694579.english: - It seemed like an emergency countermeasure meeting was necessary.
1000694579.korean: - 아무래도… 긴급 대책 회의가 필요할 것 같았다.

1000694580.english: …So, the reason Galatea canceled going fishing with me and started practicing swimming on her own…
1000694580.korean: …그러니까, 갈라테아가 나랑 낚시 가는 것도 캔슬하고 혼자 수영 연습을 하는 이유가…

1000694581.english: Was because of a rumor gone wrong.

1000694582.english: Wh-what do we do…? Everyone's practicing so hard…
1000694582.korean: 어, 어떡하죠…? 다들 저렇게 열심히 연습하고 계신데…

1000694583.english: Can't we just apologize and cancel the competition?
1000694583.korean: 그냥 양해를 구하고 대회 취소를 하면 되는 거 아닌가?

1000694588.english: If I just win first place, won't that solve everything?
1000694588.korean: 그냥 내가 1등을 하면 문제 없는 거 아니겠어?

1000694589.english: - But could Alcyone, who only just woke from the life-support system, really beat those members who've been practicing so hard?
1000694589.korean: - 하지만 생명유지장치에서 일어난 지도 얼마 안 된 알키오네가, 저렇게 열심히 연습하는 대원들을 이길 수 있을까?

1000694590.english: Of course. What do you take me for, Master?
1000694590.korean: 당연하지. 날 뭘로 보는 거야, 주인님?

1000694591.english: I'm an orca. The apex predator of the sea, a fearsome hunter who can catch anything.
1000694591.korean: 난 범고래라고. 바다 생태계의 최상위 포식자이자, 무엇이든 사냥할 수 있는 무시무시한 사냥꾼.

1000694592.korean: 수영 연습 같은 건 안 해도 괜찮아!

1000694593.english: Uh, but you practiced swimming with me yesterday too, remember?
1000694593.korean: 어, 그렇지만 어제도 저랑 같이 수영 연습 하셨잖아요?

1000694595.english: H-Hela… we agreed to keep that a secret…
1000694595.korean: 헤, 헬라야… 그건 비밀로 하기로 했잖아…

1000694596.english: Ah, ahh! I was supposed to keep it a secret from Master too!
1000694596.korean: 아, 아앗! 인간님한테도 비밀로 해야 했군요!

1000694600.english: It's just that… after spending so long inside Atlas, I lost some muscle…
1000694600.korean: 그냥… 아틀라스 속에서 시간을 너무 오래 보내서 근육이 좀 빠진 탓에…

1000694601.english: So it's harder to swim as powerfully as before.
1000694601.korean: 예전만큼 파워풀하게 헤엄치기가 힘든 것 뿐이야.

1000694602.english: - Even Alcyone, whom I trusted, couldn't guarantee victory…
1000694602.korean: - 믿었던 알키오네마저 승리를 장담할 수 없는 상황…

1000694603.english: - …It seemed better to expect the worst.
1000694603.korean: - …아무래도 최악의 결과를 예상하는 편이 좋을 것 같다.

1000694605.english: I'll win first place and help you!

1000694607.english: - For someone who couldn't even go into the water without a tube, it was far too distant a goal.
1000694607.korean: - 튜브 없이는 물에 들어갈 수 없는 헬라에게는 너무나도 먼 목표였다.

1000694608.english: It can't be helped. Let me give you a golden piece of advice to get through this.
1000694608.korean: 어쩔 수 없군. 내 이 상황을 빠져나갈 수 있는 황금 같은 조언을 하나 해 주지.

1000694609.english: Give up. If you give up, it's easy.

1000694610.english: - I did think about it, but in the end…

1000694611.english: - As Sagat said… it seemed better to prepare my heart for it.
1000694611.korean: - 삿갓의 말대로… 마음의 준비를 하는 것이 좋을 것 같았다.

1000694612.english: - Well, though I trembled with fear like this… they wouldn't make an outrageous demand I couldn't possibly grant. All my members are good kids…
1000694612.korean: - 뭐, 내가 이렇게 공포에 떨기는 했지만… 내가 들어줄 수 없을 정도로 엄청난 요구를 하지는 않을 것이다. 우리 대원들은 다들 착한 애들이니까…

1000694614.english: - And so, without finding any clever solution, time passed…
1000694614.korean: - 그리고, 딱히 뾰족한 방법을 찾지 못한 채로 시간이 지나…

1000694615.english: - And at last, the fated day arrived.

1000694616.english: - The 1.5th Orca Swimming Competition was about to begin.
1000694616.korean: - 제1.5회 오르카 수영대회가 열리게 된 것이다.

1000694617.english: Now! Soldiers! At last, the day you've all been waiting for has come!
1000694617.korean: 자! 제군들! 드디어 제군들이 기다리던 그 날이 왔다!

1000694618.english: On this hot summer day, against the blue seas of Malta, a chance to show off the swimming skills you've honed…
1000694618.korean: 이 무더운 여름날, 푸른 몰타의 바다를 배경으로 갈고 닦은 수영 실력을 마음껏 뽐낼 수 있는…

1000694619.english: The day of the 1.5th Orca Swimming Competition!
1000694619.korean: 제1.5회 오르카 수영 대회가 열리는 날 말이다!

1000694622.english: Good! I expect a fair, splendid… and above all, safe match!
1000694622.korean: 좋아! 정정당당하고, 멋지고… 무엇보다도 안전한 승부를 펼치리라 기대해 보겠다!

1000694623.english: All participants, to the starting line!

1000694624.english: - Among the soldiers, whose nervousness was clear, I spotted Hela clutching her tube…
1000694624.korean: - 긴장한 기색이 역력한 대원들 사이에, 튜브를 든 헬라가 끼어 있는 걸 보며…

1000694625.english: - And I prayed desperately that no accidents would occur.
1000694625.korean: - 나는 제발 안전사고만은 일어나지 않기를 간절히 기도하기로 했다.

1000694629.english: - Without Orangeade or Spriggan's commentary, it felt a little awkward, but…
1000694629.korean: - 오렌지에이드나 스프리건의 해설이 없으니 좀 어색한 느낌이었지만…

1000694631.english: - Right from the start, Galatea, Alcyone, and Nereid shot into the lead.
1000694631.korean: - 시작하자마자 선두로 치고 나가는 갈라테아와 알키오네, 그리고 네레이드.

1000694633.english: - When Efreeti and Amphitrite came fiercely chasing behind them, everyone couldn't help but cheer.
1000694633.korean: - 그 뒤를 맹렬하게 추격하는 이프리트와 엠피트리테를 보자, 다들 환호성을 지를 수 밖에 없었다.

1000694634.english: - With Efreeti's unexpected strong showing, and the rankings constantly shifting in a fierce battle, everyone was deeply absorbed, shouting the names of the competitors they supported.
1000694634.korean: - 예상하지 못한 이프리트의 선전과, 순위가 몇 번이고 뒤바뀌는 치열한 싸움에 다들 상당히 몰입한 듯… 다들 자기가 응원하는 선수의 이름을 부르며 환호성을 지르고 있었다.

1000694635.english: - While the top ranks were embroiled in fierce rivalry, there was one competitor firmly holding onto last place…
1000694635.korean: - 이렇게 상위권에서 치열한 순위 경쟁이 벌어지는 가운데, 꼴찌의 자리를 굳건하게 지키고 있는 선수가 있었으니…

1000694637.english: I'm kicking as hard as I can, but I'm not moving forward…
1000694637.korean: 발을 열심히 차고 있는데, 앞으로 안 나가…

1000694638.english: - It was Hela, who still hadn't even left the starting line.
1000694638.korean: - 아직도 출발선을 벗어나지 못한 헬라 선수였다.

1000694640.english: It's my fault for only focusing on training the other members and neglecting Hela.
1000694640.korean: 대원들을 지도하는 것에만 신경 쓰다 보니 헬라에게 신경을 써 주지 못한 제 불찰입니다.

1000694641.english: I'll have to take her to the pool later and teach her how to swim.
1000694641.korean: 나중에 함께 수영장에 가서 수영하는 법을 가르쳐 줘야겠군요.

1000694642.english: You don't need to worry too much about that.
1000694642.korean: 그 점에 대해서는 너무 걱정하지 않으셔도 됩니다.

1000694644.english: - In that moment, a large wave crashed over Hela…
1000694644.korean: - 아차 하는 사이, 큰 파도가 헬라를 덮쳤고…

1000694645.english: - She lost her tube and was swept away.
1000694645.korean: - 헬라는 그대로 튜브를 놓치고 파도에 휩쓸렸다.

1000694646.english: - It was a spine-chillingly tense moment, but…
1000694646.korean: - 등에 소름이 돋을 정도로 긴장되는 순간이었지만…

1000694650.english: Yes… I swallowed some water, but I'm okay…
1000694650.korean: 네… 물을 좀 먹긴 했는데 괜찮아요…

1000694651.english: Here, take my hand. Let's go together to the end. We have to finish, right?
1000694651.korean: 자, 손 잡고. 같이 끝까지 가자. 완주는 해야지?

1000694652.english: I'll hold you from the other side.

1000694654.english: - Hela held Impet and Habettrot's hands and swam hard…
1000694654.korean: - 헬라는 임펫과 하베트롯의 손을 잡고 열심히 헤엄쳤고…

1000694655.english: - Seeing this, the other members began gathering around her as well.
1000694655.korean: - 그 모습을 본 다른 대원들도 점점 헬라의 주변에 모여들기 시작했다.

1000694657.english: Is it okay for everyone to come like this?

1000694658.english: First place is important, but like Captain Marie said…

1000694660.english: Well, I can always get discharged next time with a medal.
1000694660.korean: 뭐, 전역이야 다음에 훈장 하나 받고 하면 되는 일이지.

1000694661.english: And without me, who'd stop Brownie from causing trouble? Am I right?
1000694661.korean: 그리고 나 없으면 브라우니 사고치는 걸 누가 막겠어. 안 그래?

1000694662.english: Heeey… I don't cause that much trouble anymore.
1000694662.korean: 에에… 저 이제 사고 그렇게 많이 안 침다.

1000694663.english: Really? From what I heard, when you were on night watch yesterday…
1000694663.korean: 그래? 내가 듣기로는 너 어제 불침번 설 때…

1000694664.english: Aaaah, sorry! P-please keep that a secret!
1000694664.korean: 으아악, 죄송함다! 그, 그건 비밀로 해 주시지 말임다!

1000694665.english: See? This is how hard my life is.

1000694666.english: Come on, let's go. Everyone's waiting.

1000694668.english: - All the other members were waiting at the finish line for Hela.
1000694668.korean: - 다른 대원들은 전부 결승선 앞에서 헬라를 기다리고 있었다.

1000694669.english: - The members all crossed the finish line together…
1000694669.korean: - 대원들은 다 같이 모여서 결승선을 통과했고…

1000694670.english: - Marie, as if she had been waiting, blew her whistle and said.
1000694670.korean: - 마리는 기다렸다는 듯 호루라기를 불며 말했다.

1000694671.english: Then, I shall announce the results of the competition!

1000694672.english: Since everyone crossed the finish line at the same time…

1000694673.english: Everyone who participated in the 1.5th Orca Swimming Competition is 1st place! Congratulations, comrades!
1000694673.korean: 제1.5회 오르카 수영대회에 참여한 이들 모두가 1등이다! 축하한다, 제군들!

1000694674.english: - The soldiers' cheers rang out, and those who hadn't participated in the competition brought out ice boxes and barbecue grills, as if they had been prepared in advance, and began Setting up for a festival.
1000694674.korean: - 대원들의 환호가 울려퍼졌고, 대회에 참가하지 않았던 대원들은 기다렸다는 듯 미리 준비해 놓았던 것 같은 아이스박스와 바비큐 그릴을 가져와 축제를 준비하기 시작했다.

1000694675.english: - I could only stare blankly, unable to understand the situation.
1000694675.korean: - 나는 상황을 이해하지 못한 채 멍한 표정을 지을 수밖에 없었다.

1000694676.english: - No, just what on earth is going on?
1000694676.korean: - 아니, 대체 무슨 일이 벌어지고 있는 거지?

1000694677.english: - Marie burst out laughing at my expression.
1000694677.korean: - 마리는 내 표정을 보고 웃음을 터뜨렸다.

1000694678.english: It seems our surprise event operation was a success.
1000694678.korean: 아무래도 저희 서프라이즈 이벤트 작전이 성공적이었던 모양이군요.

1000694679.english: That… might be better heard from someone else, not me.
1000694679.korean: 그건… 제가 아니라 다른 분께 이야기를 듣는 편이 좋을 것 같군요.

1000694681.english: Didn't I tell you? Things get easier if you just give up.

1000694682.english: Obviously, I was talking about this. What else did you think I meant?
1000694682.korean: 그럼 당연히 이 얘기였지. 뭘 생각한 건가?

1000694683.english: - …No matter how I look at it, it feels like you deliberately spoke ambiguously just to tease me…
1000694683.korean: - …아무리 생각해도 날 놀리려고 일부러 헷갈리게 말한 것 같은데…

1000694684.english: Haha, half of it was that, sure.

1000694685.english: Anyway, it's good not to disappoint the members, but…
1000694685.korean: 아무튼, 대원들을 실망시키지 않는 것도 좋지만…

1000694686.english: Sometimes, simply telling the truth is the best solution, don't you think?
1000694686.korean: 때로는 그냥 사실대로 말하는 게 가장 좋은 해결책일 때도 있는 법 아니겠나?

1000694687.english: So I went around here and there, telling everyone the truth of this incident.
1000694687.korean: 그래서 내가 여기저기 돌아다니면서 이번 사건의 진실을 이야기하고 다녔다네.

1000694688.english: Fortunately, they all quickly accepted that it had just been a misunderstanding.
1000694688.korean: 다행히 다들 오해에서 비롯된 해프닝이었다는 사실을 금방 납득해 주더군.

1000694689.english: In the process, Major Galatea, who heard the story, came up with the plan that everyone would enter together in 1st place to surprise Your Excellency.
1000694689.korean: 그 과정에서 이야기를 전해들은 갈라테아 소령이, 다 같이 1등으로 들어가서 각하를 깜짝 놀라게 해 드리자는 계획을 세웠죠.

1000694690.english: Hehe, think of it as a little punishment for trying to work during vacation, Your Excellency.
1000694690.korean: 후후, 휴가 중에 일을 하려고 한 벌이라고 생각하십시오, 각하.

1000694695.english: We just wanted to see who among us was the fastest swimmer.
1000694695.korean: 그냥 우리 중에 누가 제일 빠른 수영선수인지 정도는 알아보고 싶어서 그랬지.

1000694696.english: Though, in the end, things got muddled because we had to rescue Hela.
1000694696.korean: 뭐, 이번에는 헬라를 구하러 가느라 흐지부지 되기는 했지만.

1000694697.english: - At some point, Alcyone and Galatea, who had come out of the water, spoke with smiles.
1000694697.korean: - 어느새 물에서 나온 알키오네와 갈라테아가 미소를 지으며 말했다.

1000694698.english: Didn't I tell you, Master? That I'd come in 1st place.
1000694698.korean: 내가 말했지, 주인님? 내가 1등 할 거라고.

1000694699.english: Of course. Don't I always say it?

1000694700.english: The Guardian Series always keeps its promises.

1000694701.english: Ahaha, Honey and Hela, the look on your faces was so funny.
1000694701.korean: 아하하, 허니랑 헬라, 놀라는 모습이 엄청 재밌네.

1000694702.english: It was my idea, but I didn't expect it to work this well.
1000694702.korean: 내가 낸 아이디어지만 이렇게 잘 먹힐 줄은 몰랐어.

1000694703.english: - Soaking wet, Hela grumbled as she joined the conversation.
1000694703.korean: - 물에 쫄딱 젖은 헬라가 툴툴대며 대화에 끼어들었다.

1000694704.english: …Don't tell me my falling into the water was part of the plan too?
1000694704.korean: …혹시 제가 물에 빠지는 것도 계획에 있었나요?

1000694705.english: Ahaha, no way. I didn't expect that either… but since everyone rushed to help you, it actually made the ending even better.
1000694705.korean: 아하하, 그럴 리가. 그건 나도 예상 못 했지만... 그래도 다들 헬라를 도와주러 와서, 오히려 더 멋지게 끝난 것 같아.

1000694706.english: Ugh, do you know how panicked I was… Next time you plan a surprise for Master, please at least give me a little heads-up too…
1000694706.korean: 으으, 제가 얼마나 당황했다구요… 다음에 인간님을 깜짝 놀라게 할 일이 있으면 저한테도 미리 살짝 말씀해 주세요…

1000694707.english: Sorry, sorry. Next time I'll be sure to let you know in advance, Hela.
1000694707.korean: 미안, 미안. 다음에는 꼭 헬라한테도 미리 말해 줄게.

1000694711.english: Anyway, since we all came in 1st place, we should get a prize, right?

1000694713.english: I don't recall hearing about that? Hehe.

1000694715.english: Don't worry too much, Honey. We all agreed to unify our wish into one.
1000694715.korean: 너무 걱정하지 마, 허니. 다들 소원을 한 가지로 통일하기로 했거든.

1000694716.english: It's simple. Master, since coming here you haven't gone into the sea even once, right?
1000694716.korean: 간단해. 주인님, 여기 와서 아직 바다에 한 번도 안 들어가 봤잖아?

1000694717.english: Yeah, I just slept soundly on the beach.

1000694718.english: - Now that you mention it… that's true.

1000694719.english: So then… let's all play together! We came all the way to Malta, we should fully enjoy the summer sea!
1000694719.korean: 그러니까… 다 같이 놀자! 모처럼 몰타까지 왔는데, 여름 바다를 만끽해야지!

1000694721.english: I-I think it's a good idea.

1000694722.english: We've already got one vote in favor. Master, what do you think?
1000694722.korean: 벌써 찬성표 하나 나왔네. 주인님 생각은?

1000694723.english: - Seeing Alcyone and the others looking at me with eyes full of expectation, I couldn't help but smile faintly.
1000694723.korean: - 잔뜩 기대하는 눈빛으로 나를 바라보는 알키오네와 다른 대원들을 보고, 나는 피식 웃을 수밖에 없었다.

1000694725.english: Then it's a race to see who reaches the sea first!
1000694725.korean: 그럼, 누가 바다까지 먼저 가는지 승부야!

1000694726.english: - With that, Galatea immediately dashed toward the sea…
1000694726.korean: - 갈라테아는 그렇게 말하고서 바로 바다를 향해 달려갔고…

1000694727.english: - I followed after the members, running toward the water.
1000694727.korean: - 나는 대원들의 뒤를 따라 바다를 향해 달려갔다.

1000694728.korean: 어서 와, 주인님! 다들 기다리고 있어!

1000694729.english: - Seeing Alcyone smiling brightly as she said that… a question I had buried in my heart suddenly resurfaced.
1000694729.korean: - 그렇게 말하며 환하게 웃는 알키오네를 보자… 문득 마음 한 켠에 묻어두었던 질문이 떠올랐다.

1000694731.english: There were hard times, and many sad times too. Once, I was almost swept under by a huge wave and dragged down to the bottom of the sea.
1000694731.korean: 힘든 일도, 슬픈 일도 많았지. 큰 파도에 휩쓸려서 바다 밑으로 가라앉을 뻔한 적도 있었어.

1000694732.english: But I'm no longer afraid of the waves.
1000694732.korean: 하지만 이제 더는 파도가 무섭지 않아.

1000694733.english: Because, just like everyone ran to save Hela… they'll run to save me too.
1000694733.korean: 왜냐하면, 다들 헬라를 구하기 위해 달려왔던 것처럼… 나를 구하기 위해 달려와 줄 테니까.

1000694734.english: - Alcyone smiled as if she found it amusing.
1000694734.korean: - 그렇게 말한 알키오네는 재밌다는 듯이 미소를 지었다.

1000694735.english: Come to think of it, Master. Did you know there's one thing you said to me inside Atlas that was wrong?
1000694735.korean: 그러고 보니까, 주인님. 전에 주인님이 아틀라스 속에서 나한테 했던 말 중에, 한 가지 틀린 말이 있다는 거 알고 있어?

1000694736.english: When you said I was the last orca left in this world.
1000694736.korean: 내가 이 세상에 남아있는 마지막 범고래라는 말.

1000694737.english: Looking now, that's not true at all, is it? Look, over there. In that sea…
1000694737.korean: 지금 보니까, 전혀 그렇지 않은 걸? 자, 저기 봐. 저 바다에…

1000694739.english: - Seeing Orca's members swimming happily in the sea, I couldn't help but smile faintly.
1000694739.korean: - 나는 바다에서 신나게 헤엄치고 있는 오르카의 대원들을 보고 피식 미소를 지었다.

1000694740.english: Yeah. So let's forget the sad memories for now and just have fun!
1000694740.korean: 그래. 그러니까, 지금은 슬픈 기억은 잠시 잊어버리고 신나게 놀자!

1000694742.english: Orca Park, full of dreams and hope!

1000694743.english: < Island of the Dreaming Mermaid > END.

1000694744.english: I never thought I'd come back here.
1000694744.korean: 여기 다시 오게 될 줄은 몰랐군.

1000694745.english: What brings you back to Atlas?
1000694745.korean: 아틀라스에는 무슨 볼일이길래 다시 오신 겁니까?

1000694746.english: I think I need to check the database.
1000694746.korean: 데이터베이스를 한 번 확인해 봐야 할 것 같아서 말이야.

1000694748.english: Right. There are still a few unanswered questions remaining. For example…
1000694748.korean: 그래. 아직 풀리지 않은 몇 가지 의문점이 남아 있거든. 예를 들면…

1000694749.english: Why did Delta do nothing after occupying Malta?
1000694749.korean: 델타는 왜 몰타를 점령하고 나서 아무 것도 하지 않은 걸까?

1000694751.english: If they established a forward base in Malta, it would certainly be a great help when advancing toward Africa in the future... and Delta couldn't possibly have been unaware of that.
1000694751.korean: 몰타에 전진기지를 지어 놓는다면 추후 아프리카 방면으로 진출할 때 분명 큰 도움이 될 텐데… 델타가 그걸 몰랐을 리도 없고요.

1000694752.english: And, Alcyone's survival is also one of the questions.
1000694752.korean: 그리고, 알키오네의 생존도 의문점 중 하나지.

1000694753.english: Alcyone's survival… you mean? Well, since Atlas is a device that can heal physical injuries as well…
1000694753.korean: 알키오네의 생존… 말씀이십니까? 그거야, 아틀라스가 신체적 부상도 치료할 수 있는 장치이기에…

1000694755.english: But think about it. According to Alcyone's story, she was shot in the head and lost consciousness.
1000694755.korean: 하지만 생각해 보게. 알키오네의 이야기에 따르면, 알키오네는 머리에 총을 맞고 의식을 잃었네.

1000694756.english: Given her sturdy body typical of an orca, even if we assume the bullet was blocked in her skull...
1000694756.korean: 범고래답게 튼튼한 몸이라서 총알이 머리뼈에 막혔다고 가정하더라도…

1000694757.english: How did Alcyone get into Atlas after that? And on top of that, she went through this long cave while out of her mind from being shot?
1000694757.korean: 그 뒤에 알키오네는 어떻게 아틀라스까지 들어간 거지? 게다가, 총에 맞아서 제정신이 아닌 상태로 이 긴 동굴을 지나갔다고?

1000694758.english: How likely is that? And what about the probability that Delta would have just stood by and watched?
1000694758.korean: 그럴 가능성이 얼마나 되겠나? 그리고, 델타가 그걸 두고 보았을 가능성은?

1000694760.english: There is no possibility that Delta put it in herself.

1000694762.english: It’s not just a simple joke. According to the information we have… in that situation, there is no one other than Delta who can put Alcyone into Atlas.
1000694762.korean: 단순한 농담만은 아닙니다. 저희가 가진 정보에 의하면… 그 상황에서는 델타가 아니면 알키오네를 아틀라스에 넣을 수 있는 인물이 없으니까요.

1000694763.english: Right. That is exactly the point of doubt.
1000694763.korean: 그래. 바로 그 점이 의문이라는 걸세.

1000694766.english: As for how you two ended up in the dream…
1000694766.korean: 자네들이 꿈 속에 들어오게 된 경위 말인데…

1000694767.english: It was because I inhaled the sleeping gas that had leaked out due to the broken tank. Atlas's range had also expanded to cover the entire island...
1000694767.korean: 수면가스 탱크가 부서진 것 때문에 바깥으로 퍼져 나온 수면가스를 마셨기 때문이었죠. 아틀라스의 범위도 섬 전체로 넓어져 있었고…

1000694769.english: Are you saying it is strange that Atlas's range covers the entire island? I understand that was intentional during production. In order to turn the island of Malta itself into a massive trauma care center…
1000694769.korean: 아틀라스의 범위가 섬 전체를 뒤덮고 있는 것이 이상하다는 말씀이신가요? 그건 제작 시에 의도된 사항으로 알고 있습니다. 몰타 섬 자체를 거대한 트라우마 케어 센터로 만들기 위해…

1000694770.english: No, I was talking about sleeping gas.
1000694770.korean: 아니, 나는 수면가스 얘기를 하던 거였네.

1000694771.english: Malta is quite windy, isn't it? Even so, you guys fell asleep on the beach after inhaling sleeping gas.
1000694771.korean: 몰타 섬은 꽤 바람이 많은 편이잖나? 그런데도 자네들은 해변에서 수면가스를 마시고 잠이 들었지.

1000694772.english: … Now that I think about it, it does seem strange. Even assuming that surface gas is heavier than air, it wouldn't be easy to cover the entire island of Malta with it given the strong winds.
1000694772.korean: …말씀을 듣고 보니 이상하긴 하군요. 수면가스가 공기보다 무거운 기체라고 가정해도, 바람이 많이 부는 몰타에서 섬 전체를 수면가스로 뒤덮기란 쉽지 않겠죠.

1000694773.english: Unless Atlas continues to produce sleeping gas and spray it across Malta, that is.
1000694773.korean: 아틀라스가 계속 수면 가스를 생산해서 몰타 전역에 살포하고 있지 않는 한, 말입니다.

1000694774.english: It would be reasonable to view it that way.

1000694775.english: After seeing the marionette corpses that had died without a single scratch, I came up with a hypothesis.
1000694775.korean: 상처 하나 없이 죽어 있던 마리오네트의 시체들을 보고 나서, 난 한 가지 가설을 세웠네.

1000694776.english: Delta occupied Malta, but had no choice but to give it up.
1000694776.korean: 델타는 몰타를 점령하긴 했지만, 포기할 수 밖에 없던 거라고.

1000694777.english: So you are saying that someone activated Atlas and put the entire island to sleep...
1000694777.korean: 누군가 아틀라스를 가동시켜, 섬 전체를 잠에 빠뜨렸다… 는 말씀이시군요.

1000694778.english: Haha, it’s really nice that you guys and the Commander get along so well. It’s fun talking to you.
1000694778.korean: 하하, 자네들이랑 사령관은 말이 잘 통해서 참 좋단 말이지. 얘기를 하는 맛이 있어.

1000694779.english: Anyway, that 'someone' couldn't possibly be Delta, and there's no possibility that Alcyone manipulated Atlas either.
1000694779.korean: 아무튼, 그 ‘누군가’가 델타일 리는 없고, 알키오네가 아틀라스를 조작했을 가능성도 없지.

1000694780.english: Judging by your reaction as if you are hearing this story for the first time, it is not very likely that the Mermaid members manipulated Atlas.
1000694780.korean: 자네가 이 이야기를 처음 듣는다는 것처럼 반응하는 것으로 보아, 머메이드 대원들이 아틀라스를 조작했을 가능성도 그리 많지 않고.

1000694781.english: … Yes. It wasn't something we did.

1000694782.english: So, just in case that 'someone' might be recorded in Atlas's camera sensor, let's check Atlas's database.
1000694782.korean: 그래서, 혹시나 그 ‘누군가’가 아틀라스의 카메라 센서에 기록되어 있지는 않을까 해서 아틀라스의 데이터베이스를 확인해보자는 걸세.

1000694783.english: Besides, since Atlas has shut down, there is no security program to stop me.
1000694783.korean: 게다가 아틀라스는 가동을 정지했으니, 날 막을 보안 프로그램도 없고 말이야.

1000694784.english: Well then, shall we try connecting?
1000694784.korean: 그럼, 어디 한 번 접속을 해 볼까?

1000694786.english: You succeeded without much difficulty. I was a bit worried that the database might have been lost when the Atlas stopped working, but fortunately, it looks like the data remained.
1000694786.korean: 어렵지 않게 성공했네. 아틀라스가 작동을 정지하면서 데이터베이스까지 날아갔을까 걱정을 좀 했는데, 다행히 데이터가 남아있던 모양이군.

1000694790.english: … Is there really a high-grade data lock like this? On top of that, this security program…
1000694790.korean: …이 정도로 고등급의 데이터 락이 걸려 있다고? 거기에, 이 보안 프로그램은…

1000694791.english: It's not a security program made by Saman.

1000694792.english: …Huh? But, Atlas is a machine made by Saman…

1000694793.english: … Right. But this security program here… is definitely PECS’s.
1000694793.korean: …그래. 하지만 여기 있는 이 보안 프로그램은… 분명히 PECS의 것일세.

1000694794.english: I think I need to take a serious look into how this happened.
1000694794.korean: 어떻게 된 건지, 진지하게 한 번 살펴봐야 할 것 같군.

1000694796.english: Phew, I finally broke through the security.

1000694797.english: Alright, then let's see just who was behind such strong protection…
1000694797.korean: 좋아, 그럼 어디 한 번 대체 누구시길래 이렇게나 강력한 보안이 걸려 있었는지, 확인을 해 볼까…

1000694799.english: No… why on earth is this guy showing up here?
1000694799.korean: 아니, 대체 이 녀석이 왜 여기서 나오는 거지?

1000694800.english: …Who was it that appeared on the camera?
1000694800.korean: …대체 카메라에 나와 있던 게 누구길래 그러십니까?

1000694801.english: …My apologies. The information is too shocking…

1000694802.english: The intruder who put Alcyone into Atlas and activated it was…
1000694802.korean: 알키오네를 아틀라스에 집어넣고, 아틀라스를 가동시킨 침입자의 정체는…

1000694804.english: - Alcyone and I could not hide our shock at the information conveyed by Satgat and Amphitrite.
1000694804.korean: - 삿갓과 엠피트리테가 전해준 정보에, 나와 알키오네는 충격을 숨길 수가 없었다.

1000694807.english: - Why on earth is gamma coming out of there…?

1000694808.english: - Alpha, who had been hearing our story over the communication, shook her head.
1000694808.korean: - 통신으로 우리 이야기를 전해듣던 알파는 고개를 저었다.

1000694809.english: … Considering Gamma’s personality, it’s not entirely impossible, but…
1000694809.korean: …감마의 성격을 생각한다면, 그렇게 가능성이 없는 얘기는 아니지만…

1000694810.english: It doesn't seem like it's because of such a simple reason.
1000694810.korean: 그런 단순한 이유 때문은 아닌 것 같네요.

1000694811.english: Right. And this is… Alcyone, a video I brought because I thought you really need to hear it.
1000694811.korean: 그래. 그리고 이건… 알키오네, 자네가 꼭 들어봐야 할 것 같아서 가져온 영상일세.

1000694812.english: A video I absolutely must watch?

1000694813.english: Well, since there is nothing but sound files... it's closer to a message than a video. It was hidden deep inside Atlas's internal memory.
1000694813.korean: 뭐, 사운드 파일밖에 없으니… 영상이라기보다는 메시지에 가깝지. 아틀라스의 내부 메모리에 꽁꽁 숨겨져 있더군.

1000694814.english: Sit down for a moment. It's quite long, you know.
1000694814.korean: 잠시 앉아보게. 내용이 꽤 기니까 말이야.

1000694817.english: This is… a recording I left in case you wake up earlier than I expected. Or… if I end up in a situation where I can't go wake you up.
1000694817.korean: 이건… 언니가 내가 생각한 것보다 일찍 깨어날 때를 대비해서 남긴 녹음이야. 아니면… 내가 언니를 깨우러 갈 수 없는 상황이 되거나.

1000694818.english: … I hope you never have to hear this. Right?
1000694818.korean: …되도록 이걸 듣게 되는 일이 없었으면 좋겠네. 그렇지?

1000694820.english: Where did things start to go wrong?

1000694821.english: Trying to negotiate with Delta? Waging war against Delta? Or… accepting the Mermaid sisters into Malta?
1000694821.korean: 델타와 협상을 하려고 했던 것? 델타와 전쟁을 벌인 것? 아니면… 머메이드 언니들을 몰타에 받아들인 것?

1000694822.english: … No. Let’s not go that far. I don’t want to become that despicable.
1000694822.korean: …아니. 이렇게까지 생각하진 말자. 그렇게까지 비열해지고 싶지는 않으니까.

1000694823.english: It must be our fault for falling for Delta's trap.

1000694824.english: Anyway, you must be wondering what happened to me while my sister was unconscious.
1000694824.korean: 아무튼, 언니가 의식을 잃고 있던 동안… 내게 무슨 일이 있었는지 궁금하겠지.

1000694825.english: I'm going to tell you now. I'm talking about what happened after that terrible explosion.
1000694825.korean: 지금부터 들려줄게. 그 끔찍한 폭발 이후에 있던 일 말이야.

1000694828.english: - A splitting headache. A burning sensation around the eyes. Aching joints all over and dry lips.
1000694828.korean: - 머리가 깨질 것 같은 두통. 눈가에 느껴지는 화끈거리는 느낌. 여기저기 쑤시는 관절과 메마른 입술.

1000694829.english: - It felt even more terrible than when I secretly drank with Alcyone before.
1000694829.korean: - 전에 알키오네 언니랑 몰래 술을 먹었을 때보다 더 끔찍한 느낌이었다.

1000694830.english: - My memory was hazy, as if a thick fog had settled in my head.
1000694830.korean: - 머리 속에 뿌연 안개가 낀 듯, 기억이 흐릿했다.

1000694831.korean: - 어떻게 된 거지? 난 어디에 있는 거지?

1000694832.english: Oh, are you awake? That's faster than I expected.

1000694833.english: It certainly looks sturdy, perhaps because it is based on an orca, even though it is small.
1000694833.korean: 확실히 몸집은 작아도 원판이 범고래라서 그런지 튼튼한 모양이네.

1000694834.english: - A voice was heard from somewhere. Who is it?

1000694836.english: Me? I'm the one who saved you from the water.

1000694837.english: Th-thank you. But where is this place...?

1000694838.english: You don't need to know that right now.
1000694838.korean: 그건 지금 당장은 알 거 없어.

1000694839.english: More importantly, seeing how your voice is cracking, you should probably drink some water first.
1000694839.korean: 그보다 목소리가 쩍쩍 갈라지는 걸 보니, 일단 물부터 좀 마시는 게 좋겠는데.

1000694840.english: - Something was shoved into my mouth. Is it a straw?

1000694841.english: - As I put a straw in my mouth and frantically gulped down water, I finally felt my senses returning.
1000694841.korean: - 빨대를 입에 물고 정신없이 물을 들이켜자, 그제서야 정신이 좀 돌아오는 느낌을 받았다.

1000694843.english: Don't worry about it. It hasn't been long since your eyes were repaired, so you probably can't see right now anyway. Why don't you just focus on recovering for now?
1000694843.korean: 신경 쓰지 마. 눈 수복이 끝난 지 얼마 지나지 않은 상황이라 지금 당장은 앞도 안 보일 텐데, 일단 회복하는 데에 집중하지 그래?

1000694844.english: They say it was a massive explosion visible from a distance. That Delta guy must have been really holding a grudge...
1000694844.korean: 멀리서도 보일 정도로 엄청난 폭발이었다고. 델타 녀석, 꽤 이를 갈고 있던 모양인데…

1000694845.english: Delta…? Right. I… went to negotiate with Delta… but fell into a trap…
1000694845.korean: 델타…? 맞아. 난… 델타랑 협상을 하러 갔다가… 함정에 빠져서…

1000694847.english: I told you. It was such a massive explosion that it could be seen from afar.
1000694847.korean: 말했잖아. 멀리서도 보일 정도로 엄청난 폭발이었다고.

1000694848.english: There is no way you could survive being caught in an explosion of that magnitude.
1000694848.korean: 그 정도 폭발에 휘말리고도 살아남을 수 있을 리가 없지.

1000694850.english: What about Malta? With the other sisters… and Galatea, who followed us…?
1000694850.korean: 몰타는요? 다른 언니들이랑… 우릴 따라왔던 갈라테아 언니는…?

1000694851.english: That… I’d better listen to it a bit later. For now, just go back to sleep.
1000694851.korean: 그건… 좀 나중에 듣는 편이 좋겠는데. 일단 더 자기나 해.

1000694856.english: - When I woke up, I was greeted by the cold, unfamiliar ceiling of a hospital room.
1000694856.korean: - 잠에서 깨어났을 때, 나를 맞이한 건 차갑고 낯선 병실의 천장이었다.

1000694857.english: - I guess I was the only one lying in the hospital room, as I didn't sense any other presence.
1000694857.korean: - 아무래도 병실에 누워 있던 건 나 혼자였는지, 다른 인기척은 느껴지지 않았다.

1000694860.korean: - 단서를 찾기 위해 주위를 둘러보던 도중…

1000694861.english: - I was able to find the PECS mark drawn on the patient gown I was wearing.
1000694861.korean: - 나는 내가 입고 있는 환자복에 그려진 PECS의 마크를 발견할 수 있었다.

1000694863.english: (This... could it be that I've been taken prisoner?)

1000694864.english: (If that's the case… I have to get out of here quickly! I have to go back to Malta…!)
1000694864.korean: (그런 거라면… 빨리 빠져나가야 해! 몰타로 돌아가야만 해…!)

1000694865.english: - I forcibly pulled the needle out of my arm, staggered out of bed, and walked toward the door to open it.
1000694865.korean: - 팔에 꽂혀 있는 주사바늘을 억지로 잡아 빼고, 비틀대며 침대에서 일어난 나는 문으로 다가가서 문을 열려고 했다.

1000694866.english: - But the door was firmly locked…

1000694867.english: - Panicked that I had really been taken prisoner, I smashed the door open and ran down the hallway.
1000694867.korean: - 정말로 포로로 잡혔다고 생각해 패닉에 빠진 나는 그대로 문을 후려쳐 박살내고 복도를 달렸다.

1000694868.english: - The AGS units dispatched after detecting the facility's destruction blocked my path, but…
1000694868.korean: - 시설이 부서진 것을 감지하고 출동한 AGS들이 내 앞을 가로막았지만…

1000694869.english: - Since I couldn't be caught here, I decided to pick up something nearby that could serve as a weapon and resist.
1000694869.korean: - 여기에서 잡힐 수는 없기에, 나는 근처에서 무기가 될 만한 것을 주워 들고 저항하기로 했다.

1000694870.english: Ugh, did I push too hard before my recovery was complete…?
1000694870.korean: 으윽, 수복이 끝나지 않은 상태로 너무 무리했나…

1000694872.english: But… did they really think I'd let myself get caught here…!

1000694873.english: As long as I can make it to the deck…!

1000694874.english: Ha… I step away for a moment and everything turns into a mess.

1000694875.english: - Just then, a familiar voice reached my ears.

1000694877.english: - In an instant, I was subdued and slammed onto the ground.

1000694878.english: Don't struggle. If you die, it'll just be annoying to clean up.
1000694878.korean: 날뛰지 말라고, 죽어버리기라도 하면 치우기 귀찮으니까.

1000694880.english: Lemonade Gamma. Or to put it nicely… the one who just saved you.
1000694880.korean: 레모네이드 감마다. 뭐, 생색 좀 내자면… 널 구해준 사람이지.

1000694882.english: Simply because I felt like it. Is there a problem with that?
1000694882.korean: 그냥 내가 그러고 싶었으니까. 뭐 문제될 거 있나?

1000694883.english: Anyway, holding you down like this is getting boring… I'll let you go, so stop struggling. Got it?
1000694883.korean: 아무튼, 이렇게 붙잡고 있는 것도 지겹고… 풀어줄 테니까 이제 날뛰지 마라. 알겠어?

1000694887.english: I know you and Delta aren't exactly on the best of terms…
1000694887.korean: 네가 델타랑 그렇게 유쾌한 사이가 아니라는 건 알고 있지만 말이야…

1000694888.english: If I wanted to kill you, I would've done it already. Why would I bother treating you?
1000694888.korean: 내가 널 죽이고 싶었으면 진작 죽였지, 뭐하러 귀찮게 치료를 해 줬겠어?

1000694889.english: Calm down and just follow me.

1000694891.english: Or what, you're saying you won't accept Lemonade's help? Is that it?
1000694891.korean: 아니면 뭐, 레모네이드의 도움은 받지 않겠어! 그런 거냐?

1000694892.english: …It's not that, but… since I can't guess what you're scheming, I have no choice but to stay on guard.
1000694892.korean: …그건 아니지만… 당신 꿍꿍이가 짐작이 안 되니까 경계할 수 밖에.

1000694893.english: Hah, fine… if you really need a reason, I'll explain logically why I went out of my way to save you.
1000694893.korean: 하, 좋아… 정 이유가 필요하다면, 내가 왜 굳이 널 살렸는지 논리적으로 설명해주지.

1000694896.english: I saved you because it looked fun.

1000694897.english: …You saved me for such a trivial reason?
1000694897.korean: …고작 그런 이유 때문에 날 살린 거라고?

1000694898.english: What's the problem? I'm Lemonade Gamma. There are only two people in this world who can tell me what to do.
1000694898.korean: 뭐가 문제지? 난 레모네이드 감마다. 나보고 이래라 저래라 할 수 있는 건 이 세상에 단 둘 밖에 없어.

1000694899.english: One is the chairman I serve, and the other is… my rival, and my former superior.
1000694899.korean: 한 명은 내가 모시는 회장님이고, 다른 한 명은… 내 라이벌이자 전 상관이지.

1000694900.english: And as it happens, both of them are sealed away in preservation devices right now.
1000694900.korean: 그리고 지금은 공교롭게도 둘 다 보존장치 속에 있고.

1000694901.english: So then, who's left to stop me from doing whatever I want?
1000694901.korean: 그러니, 내가 마음대로 행동하는 걸 누가 제지할 수 있다는 거지?

1000694903.english: Anyway, so come back quietly and finish your treatment. Like I said, if you die for no reason, it'll just be a pain to deal with the corpse.
1000694903.korean: 뭐, 그러니까 얌전히 돌아와서 치료나 마저 받으라고. 말했다시피, 괜히 죽어버리기라도 하면 시체 치우기 귀찮으니까.

1000694904.english: …Alright. Since it doesn't seem you have any other intentions, I'll listen to you this time.
1000694904.korean: …좋아. 다른 뜻은 없는 것 같으니, 이번에는 당신 말을 듣도록 하지.

1000694905.english: …but once the treatment is over, I'm leaving this place immediately.

1000694908.english: Then follow me to the infirmary. You've got enough strength left for that, don't you?
1000694908.korean: 그럼 의무실로 따라오라고. 그 정도 힘은 남아 있겠지?

1000694909.english: - I was doubtful, but for the time being, I decided to follow Gamma's words. At that moment, there was no other option but to trust her…
1000694909.korean: - 미심쩍었지만, 일단 나는 감마의 말을 따르기로 했다. 그 상황에서는 감마의 말을 믿는 것 외에는 다른 방법도 없었고…

1000694910.english: - And just as Gamma had said, if she wanted me dead, she would've killed me long ago.
1000694910.korean: - 감마의 말대로, 감마가 날 죽일 거라면 진작 죽였을 테니까.

1000694912.english: As expected of an orca, tough as ever. Even with an explosion like that, you're not as badly injured as I thought. I wouldn't have been surprised if you'd lost an arm or two.
1000694912.korean: 역시 범고래라 튼튼한 건가? 그 정도 폭발이 있었는데도 생각보다 크게 다치진 않았군. 팔다리 한 두개 정도는 날아갔어도 이상하지 않았을 것 같았는데.

1000694916.english: Sister Maia pushed me away at the last moment, so I wasn't injured.
1000694916.korean: 마이아 언니가 마지막 순간에 날 밀어내서 다치지 않았던 거야.

1000694917.english: Really? Well, it was a big explosion, even from where I was watching.
1000694917.korean: 그래? 하긴, 내가 멀리서 보기에도 큰 폭발이긴 했지.

1000694918.english: So, since we're on the subject, why don't you tell me?
1000694918.korean: 그래서, 말 나온 김에 얘기나 해 봐.

1000694920.english: What happened on that ship. Something must've happened, right?
1000694920.korean: 그 배에서 있었던 일 말이야. 무슨 일이 있었을 거 아니야?

1000694921.english: Those guys who were tearing apart Delta's fleet like paper wouldn't just blunder into a trap like idiots.
1000694921.korean: 델타의 배들을 말 그대로 갈아버리던 녀석들이, 갑자기 바보처럼 함정 속으로 들어갈 리가 없을 테니까.

1000694923.english: …Never expected Delta to blow up the ship she was riding on.
1000694923.korean: …설마 델타가 자기가 타고 있던 배를 폭파해버릴 줄은 몰랐으니까.

1000694924.english: - The waters near Malta before negotiations between the Malta Defence Force and Lemonade Delta began.
1000694924.korean: - 몰타 방위군과 레모네이드 델타의 협상이 시작되기 전, 몰타 인근 해상.

1000694925.english: The weather is really clear. It's perfect weather for a fight.
1000694925.korean: 날씨 참 맑군. 싸움질하기 참 좋은 날씨야.

1000694926.english: Is there weather that is bad for fighting?

1000694927.english: That can't be true. Sunny days have their own charm, and cloudy days have their own charm as well.
1000694927.korean: 그럴 리가. 맑은 날은 맑은 날 대로, 흐린 날은 흐린 날 대로 다 싸우는 맛이 있는 거라고.

1000694928.english: … The answer was exactly as I expected, to the point of being anticlimactic…

1000694929.english: Would you be as dispirited as I am?

1000694930.english: I came to Europe expecting a bloody battle with the seven orca sisters, but to think I can't even lift a finger... there's nothing more boring than this.
1000694930.korean: 범고래 7자매와의 혈투를 기대하고 유럽에 왔는데, 손가락 하나 까딱할 수 없다니… 이렇게 재미없는 일도 없을 걸.

1000694932.english: Ah, I got a message from Delta.

1000694933.english: Delta? Well, fine. Go ahead and try connecting.
1000694933.korean: 델타가? 뭐, 좋아. 어디 한 번 연결해 봐.

1000694936.english: What else could it be? I just stopped by briefly to do some sightseeing in Malta from so far away.
1000694936.korean: 뭐긴, 멀리서 몰타 구경이나 하고 가려고 잠깐 들른 거지.

1000694937.english: would have said it was war once you set foot in Europe.
1000694937.korean: 유럽에 발을 디디면 전쟁이라고 했을 텐데?

1000694938.english: So you aren't setting foot in Europe, right? Because you're on a ship.
1000694938.korean: 그래서 유럽에 발은 안 디디고 있잖아? 배 위니까.

1000694940.english: Promises are meant to be cleverly circumvented, aren't they?
1000694940.korean: 원래 약속이라는 건 교묘하게 우회하라고 있는 거잖아.

1000694941.english: And I even went out of my way to borrow a boat from the Betas to come here out of respect for you. Isn't that quite a concession?
1000694941.korean: 그리고 널 존중하는 의미에서 일부러 베타 쪽 애들 배까지 빌려 타고 왔잖아. 이 정도면 꽤나 양보한 거 아니야?

1000694942.english: If you're still unhappy about this, well... why don't you try a real fight with me? I don't really like tormenting someone who's already in tatters, though...
1000694942.korean: 이것도 불만이면, 뭐… 나랑 진짜로 한 판 붙어 보던가. 이미 너덜너덜해진 녀석을 괴롭히는 건 그다지 좋아하지 않지만…

1000694943.english: If you take on the challenge, I won't turn down it.

1000694945.english: Wow, I can hear you grinding your teeth all the way from here. Even if you're a bioroid, you'll damage your teeth if you strain like that, okay?
1000694945.korean: 이야, 이 가는 소리가 여기까지 들리네. 아무리 바이오로이드라고 해도, 그렇게 힘주면 이 상한다?

1000694947.english: … Fine. I’ll allow you to watch from a distance. But, I’m going to take care of the orca sisters…
1000694947.korean: …좋아. 멀리서 지켜보는 것 정도는 허락해주지. 하지만, 범고래 자매들은 내가 처리할 거니까…

1000694948.korean: 함부로 몰타 년들한테 손 대지 마.

1000694949.english: What do you mean by "dealing with it"? Weren't we signing a humiliating non-aggression pact after getting beaten up in an all-out war?
1000694949.korean: 처리한다니? 전면전에서 두들겨 맞고 나서 굴욕적인 불가침조약을 맺고 있는 거 아녔어?

1000694952.english: She just hung up without even answering. How rude.

1000694953.english: Ugh... Is this really okay? If Delta attacks at this rate...
1000694953.korean: 으으… 정말 이래도 괜찮은 거 맞나요? 이러다가 델타 님이 공격이라도 해 오면…

1000694956.english: Haha, be a bit bolder. And Delta probably won't pick a fight with you either.
1000694956.korean: 하핫, 좀 대범해지라고. 그리고, 델타도 어지간해서는 이쪽에 시비 걸진 않을 거야.

1000694958.english: We wiped out our entire navy fighting the Black Sea Fleet. And right now, we're fighting a battle in Malta where the exchange ratio is unfavorable.
1000694958.korean: 흑해함대랑 싸우다가 해군을 싹 날렸거든. 지금 몰타에서도 교환비 안 나오는 싸움을 하고 있고.

1000694959.english: A fight where the exchange rate isn't even worth it?

1000694960.english: Right. Their ships were completely blown up, but all they accomplished was killing a few mermaids, right? They couldn't even lay a hand on the orcas.
1000694960.korean: 그래. 쟤들 배는 엄청 터져나갔는데, 이룬 성과라고는 머메이드 녀석들 좀 죽인 게 전부잖아? 범고래들한테는 손도 못 댔고.

1000694961.english: Of course, Delta would win if they kept fighting. There is a difference in weight class, after all. But even if they win like that, all they'll gain in the end is just a small island, right?
1000694961.korean: 물론 계속 싸우면 델타가 이기긴 하겠지. 체급 차이라는 게 있으니까. 하지만 그렇게 이겨봐야 얻는 거라고는 결국 작은 섬 하나뿐이잖아?

1000694962.english: Even though Malta is a militarily important stronghold, it isn't as valuable as it used to be since the Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) aren't going to advance into the sea anyway. It's nothing more than a Pyrrhic victory.
1000694962.korean: 몰타가 군사적으로 중요한 거점이긴 해도, 어차피 철충이 바다로 진출할 리도 없으니 이전처럼 가치가 크지도 않고. 피로스의 승리에 지나지 않는단 말이지.

1000694963.english: That is why they are signing such a humiliating treaty. In the midst of that, they squandered that much just to save face, but...
1000694963.korean: 그러니까 저렇게 굴욕적인 조약을 맺고 있는 거야. 그 와중에 체면치레라도 하려고 저렇게 자기네 배로 불렀지만…

1000694964.english: The Maltese guys searched that ship first and then agreed to negotiate on board, so practically speaking, Delta lost this fight...
1000694964.korean: 그 배도 몰타 놈들이 먼저 수색한 다음, 배에서 협상을 해도 좋다고 승낙한 거라서, 사실상 이번 싸움은 델타 쪽이 진 거나 다름 없는…

1000694966.english: - When Gamma was looking at Malta from afar…
1000694966.korean: - 감마가 멀리서 몰타를 바라보고 있을 때…

1000694967.english: - I was struggling to keep my wits about me on the Delta ship where the bomb had exploded.
1000694967.korean: - 나는 폭탄이 터진 델타의 배 위에서, 정신을 부여잡기 위해 안간힘을 쓰고 있었다.

1000694972.english: … What happened? We definitely searched the ship thoroughly before the meeting to make sure there were no explosives or traps…!
1000694972.korean: …어떻게 된 거지? 분명히 회담 전에 폭발물이나 함정이 없는지 배를 철저하게 수색했는데…!

1000694973.english: - At that moment, Delta appeared from the smoke.
1000694973.korean: - 그 때, 연기 속에서 델타가 나타났다.

1000694974.english: That looks exactly like you guys. Crawling on the floor like bugs.
1000694974.korean: 딱 너희에게 어울리는 모습이네. 벌레처럼 바닥을 기는 거 말이야.

1000694976.english: - I charged straight at Delta, but…

1000694977.english: - My attack merely sliced through the air.

1000694978.english: … What… The attack… went right through my body?

1000694979.english: Well, kids who lived in the countryside like you might not know.
1000694979.korean: 뭐, 너희처럼 촌동네에서 살던 애들은 모를 수도 있겠지.

1000694980.english: This is a technology called a hologram.

1000694981.english: I have to admit it. The Bismarck product provided by Zeta really does perform well.
1000694981.korean: 인정할 건 인정해야겠어. 제타가 제공한 비스마르크 제품이 성능이 좋긴 하네.

1000694984.english: You called me over to negotiate, and now look at this!
1000694984.korean: 협상하자고 불러 놓고, 이게 무슨 짓이야!

1000694985.english: Negotiation? Ha... This is amusing. That complacent way of thinking.
1000694985.korean: 협상? 하… 재밌네. 그 안일한 생각이.

1000694986.english: Strategy, tactics... of course they are important. But when dealing with subversives like you, there is something even more important than that.
1000694986.korean: 전략, 전술… 물론 중요하지. 하지만, 너희 같은 불순분자를 다룰 때 그런 것보다도 더 중요한 게 있어.

1000694987.english: It's about breaking their spirit so they can never rebel again.
1000694987.korean: 바로 다시는 반항하지 못하도록 기를 꺾어 놓는 거지.

1000694988.english: But, do you think there is any way those bitches who dared to humiliate me like this would let them go alive?
1000694988.korean: 그런데, 감히 내게 이런 굴욕을 준 년들을 살려 보낼 리가 있겠어?

1000694989.english: Open fire. They're tough, so we'd better make sure they're dead.
1000694989.korean: 포격 개시해. 튼튼한 것들이니까, 확실히 죽이는 게 좋겠지.

1000694992.english: Sister, are you awake? We have to run away quickly!
1000694992.korean: 언니, 정신이 들어? 빨리 도망쳐야 해!

1000694993.english: … Merope, you're wrong. You get out of here at least.

1000694995.english: - A sorrowful smile appeared on my sister's face.

1000694999.english: - My sister just lifted me up and threw me into the sea...
1000694999.korean: - 언니는 그대로 나를 번쩍 들어 바다로 던졌고…

1000695000.english: - I lost consciousness right there from the shock of the bomb exploding.
1000695000.korean: - 나는 폭탄이 폭발하는 충격에 그대로 정신을 잃고 말았다.

1000695002.english: A hologram, huh? That was a boring thing to do.

1000695003.english: Anyway... it's just sigh-inducing. They said they planned to kill all the orcas, and it's just hologram tricks and bombs?
1000695003.korean: 아무튼… 한숨이 다 나오네. 범고래를 싹 다 죽일 계획이 있다고 하더니, 겨우 홀로그램 속임수랑 폭탄이라고?

1000695004.english: Haa, if I had known this would happen, I would have just invaded Malta myself.
1000695004.korean: 하아, 이럴 줄 알았으면 그냥 내가 몰타를 침공했을 텐데.

1000695005.english: … Is that something you should say in front of the residents of Malta who were invaded?
1000695005.korean: …그게 침공당한 몰타 주민 앞에서 할 말이야?

1000695006.english: Oh dear. Was it a bit lacking in detail?

1000695008.english: … So, what is the situation like in Malta?

1000695009.english: Anyone watching would think I had left the answer to them.
1000695009.korean: 누가 보면 대답을 맡겨 놓기라도 한 줄 알겠어.

1000695010.english: Well, I can answer that much.

1000695011.english: Malta has been occupied. There isn't a single survivor among those remaining on the island.
1000695011.korean: 몰타는 점령당했다. 섬에 남아있는 녀석들 중 생존자는 단 한 명도 없어.

1000695012.english: Although a few of the mermaids managed to escape the encirclement, it was literally just a few. It is practically the same as being wiped out.
1000695012.korean: 머메이드 중 몇 녀석이 포위를 빠져나가긴 했지만, 말 그대로 몇 녀석일 뿐이지. 사실상 전멸한 거나 다름 없는 상황이다.

1000695014.english: (I can't let Malta be handed over to Delta. If that's the case, I'd rather...)
1000695014.korean: (델타에게 몰타 섬을 넘길 수는 없어. 그럴 바에는, 차라리…)

1000695015.english: What? Seeing you stand up with such a grim expression... are you planning to go start a war all by yourself?
1000695015.korean: 뭐야, 굳은 표정으로 일어나는 걸 보니… 혼자서 전쟁이라도 벌이러 가려고?

1000695018.english: … But we won't have to go to war. Because there is a way to stop Delta… from taking Malta.
1000695018.korean: …하지만 전쟁까진 벌이지 않아도 될 거야. 델타가… 몰타를 손에 넣는 걸 막을 방법이 있으니까.

1000695019.english: Hmm... I have a feeling this is going to be fun.
1000695019.korean: 흐음… 왠지 재밌을 것 같은 느낌이 드는데.

1000695020.english: Let's hear the plan. If I like it, I'll lend a hand.
1000695020.korean: 어디 한 번 그 계획 얘기나 들어 보자고. 들어보고 마음에 들면 내가 좀 거들어주지.

1000695021.english: … You’re going to help? Fight Lemonade Delta? You? Why?
1000695021.korean: …도와주겠다고? 레모네이드 델타와 싸우는 걸? 당신이? 왜?

1000695022.english: I don't exactly like Delta either. Especially the fact that she dared to blabber that she would blind my other eye, completely out of her mind.
1000695022.korean: 나도 델타가 그렇게 마음에 드는 건 아니거든. 특히, 주제도 모르고 감히 내 반대쪽 눈도 멀게 만들어 주겠다고 지껄인 점이 말이지.

1000695023.english: - Gamma, having said that, fiddled with her eyepatch with a look of longing.
1000695023.korean: - 그렇게 말한 감마는 그립다는 표정으로 안대를 만지작거렸다.

1000695025.english: Right. This scar on my eye… it’s a scar I got from a duel with the Invincible Dragon, a Bioroid that once led the combined fleet of three companies.
1000695025.korean: 그래. 이 눈의 상처는… 과거 세 회사의 연합 함대를 이끌던 바이오로이드, 무적의 용과의 결투에서 얻은 상처거든.

1000695026.english: You know, I don't really like having someone standing on top of me. But…
1000695026.korean: 난 말이야, 누가 내 머리 위에 서 있는 걸 그렇게 좋아하지 않아. 하지만…

1000695027.english: ...I came to realize it while serving as vice commander under the Invincible Dragon. If there is anyone qualified to stand above me, it is probably the Dragon herself.
1000695027.korean: ...무적의 용의 아래에서 부사령관으로 지내면서 알게 되었지. 내 위에 설 수 있는 자격을 가진 녀석이 있다면, 그건 아마 용 뿐일 거라고.

1000695028.english: That is why I deliberately left this eye unhealed. A wound earned fighting an invincible dragon is a more valuable token than any medal.
1000695028.korean: 그렇기 때문에 이 눈을 일부러 수복하지 않고 남겨둔 거다. 무적의 용과 싸워 얻은 상처는 그 어떤 훈장보다 값진 증표니까.

1000695029.english: But how dare a nobody like Delta, not only bring up the scar on my eye, but also blabber that she’ll inflict a new one on me?
1000695029.korean: 그런데 델타 따위가 감히, 내 눈의 상처를 들먹이는 걸로도 모자라 새로운 상처를 만들어 주겠다고 지껄여?

1000695030.english: This is tantamount to an insult to the invincible dragon and to me.
1000695030.korean: 이건 무적의 용과 나에 대한 모욕이나 다름없는 짓이란 말이야.

1000695031.english: Now you understand why I stepped forward to help you, right?
1000695031.korean: 이제 내가 왜 널 돕겠다고 나섰는지 알겠지?

1000695032.english: (…To be honest, it’s a hard reason to understand, but…)

1000695033.english: (The reason doesn't matter. Even if it's a surprise attack, if they are skilled enough to subdue me in an instant... that would be a great help to the plan.)
1000695033.korean: (이유는 아무래도 상관없어. 아무리 기습이라고는 해도, 날 단숨에 제압하는 실력자라면… 계획에 많은 도움이 되겠지.)

1000695035.english: It's good that the response was quick.

1000695037.english: First, I'm going to spread Atlas widely across the entire island.
1000695037.korean: 일단, 아틀라스를 섬 전체 범위로 넓게 퍼지게 만들 거야.

1000695039.english: Simply put… it’s a psychotherapy device that allows you to enter other people’s dreams while you sleep.
1000695039.korean: 간단히 말하자면… 잠을 자면 다른 사람의 꿈 속으로 들어갈 수 있게 하는 심리 치료용 장치야.

1000695040.english: … I don't understand. Are you planning to conduct a psychotherapy session with a marionette?
1000695040.korean: …이해가 안 되는데. 마리오네트와 심리 치료 세션이라도 진행할 생각인가?

1000695041.english: Atlas isn't a finished device yet, so once it goes in, it can't get out on its own.
1000695041.korean: 아틀라스는 아직 완성된 장치가 아니라서, 한 번 들어가면 자기 힘으로는 나올 수가 없거든.

1000695042.english: Even Alcyone, who had used the device once, said that if the researchers hadn't woken her up, she would have been trapped inside it for the rest of her life.
1000695042.korean: 장치를 한 번 사용해 봤던 알키오네 언니도, 연구원 분들이 깨워주지 않았다면 장치 안에 평생 갇힐 뻔했다고 했어.

1000695043.english: So, if you put all the marionettes on the island to sleep… they’ll be trapped inside Atlas for the rest of their lives, dreaming.
1000695043.korean: 그러니까, 섬 안에 있는 마리오네트를 전부 재워버리면… 녀석들은 평생 꿈을 꾸면서 아틀라스 안에 갇혀 있게 되는 거야.

1000695044.english: That’s not a bad idea. But how do you plan to put the marionette to sleep?
1000695044.korean: 나쁘지 않은 생각이군. 하지만 마리오네트를 어떻게 재울 생각이지?

1000695045.english: It turns out the marionettes on Malta aren't prepared for chemical warfare. I've never seen a marionette wearing a gas mask.
1000695045.korean: 지금 몰타 섬에 있는 마리오네트들은 화학전 대비가 되어 있지 않더라고. 방독면을 착용한 마리오네트는 본 적이 없었거든.

1000695046.english: Atlas possesses its own sleep gas synthesis facility to put patients to sleep. It also has enough raw materials to last for another 200 years.
1000695046.korean: 아틀라스는 환자를 재우기 위해 자체적인 수면가스 합성시설을 보유하고 있어. 앞으로 200년은 더 버틸 수 있을 정도의 원료도 가지고 있고.

1000695047.english: I'm going to deliberately destroy a gas tank and make the gas leak out.
1000695047.korean: 난 가스 탱크 하나를 일부러 파괴해서 가스가 새어 나가게 만들 거야.

1000695048.english: And if we use Atlas's ventilation system to make gas erupt across the entire island…
1000695048.korean: 그리고 아틀라스의 환기 시스템을 이용해서, 섬 전체에 가스가 분출되게 만들면…

1000695049.english: Then you'll be able to neutralize all the marionettes on Malta. That's smart.
1000695049.korean: 그러면 몰타 섬에 있는 마리오네트를 전부 무력화 시킬 수 있겠지. 똑똑한데.

1000695050.english: But what if follow-up forces arrive with gas countermeasures in place? Above all, the forces Delta operates aren't just Marionettes. What do you plan to do with the AGSs?
1000695050.korean: 하지만 후속 병력이 가스 대책을 세우고 온다면? 무엇보다, 델타가 운용하는 병력은 마리오네트 뿐이 아니야. AGS들은 어떻게 할 생각이지?

1000695051.english: We just need to make them unable to pay attention to Malta.
1000695051.korean: 몰타에 신경을 못 쓰게 만들면 돼.

1000695053.english: I'm going to use the time gained by activating Atlas to infiltrate Delta's key bases and facilities in Europe, and then plant bombs. For example… places like power plants.
1000695053.korean: 아틀라스를 가동해서 번 시간을 이용해서 유럽에 있는 델타의 주요 거점과 시설들에 잠입한 다음, 폭탄을 설치 할 거야. 예를 들면… 발전소 같은 곳 말이지.

1000695054.english: If key strongholds are attacked, they will likely focus on internal security rather than sending troops to Malta.
1000695054.korean: 주요 거점들이 공격받는다면 몰타에 병력을 파견하기보다는 내부 단속에 신경을 쓰게 되겠지.

1000695055.english: There’s no way a woman with a nasty personality like Delta wouldn’t have enemies. She’ll surely be too busy rooting out the internal troublemakers to even pay attention to Malta.
1000695055.korean: 델타처럼 성격이 더러운 여자에게 적이 없을 리 없지. 분명 내부에서 불순분자들을 색출하느라 몰타에는 신경도 못 쓰게 될 걸?

1000695057.english: … Why are you looking at me like that?

1000695058.english: I feel like a good idea is about to come to me.
1000695058.korean: 좋은 생각이 날 것 같아서 말이야.

1000695059.english: I'll decide later after watching them fight a bit more.
1000695059.korean: 나중에 싸우는 걸 좀 더 보고 결정하도록 하지.

1000695060.english: … I don't know what you're trying to say.

1000695064.english: I'll go for a quick walk.

1000695066.english: Yes, Gamma! Did you call me?

1000695067.english: Wait here. I'm planning to go to Malta for a short while.
1000695067.korean: 여기서 대기해라. 잠깐 몰타에 다녀올 생각이니까.

1000695068.english: What? But, um, you're saying you won't set foot on European soil...
1000695068.korean: 네? 하지만, 저기, 유럽 땅에 발을 안 디디신다고…

1000695069.english: That's just something Delta blurted out on her own.

1000695070.english: Have I ever agreed to that? As far as I remember, I don't think I have.
1000695070.korean: 내가 그 말에 동의한 적 있나? 내 기억상으로는 없는 것 같은데.

1000695071.english: Ugh... I think I'm going to get scolded by Beta later...
1000695071.korean: 으으… 나중에 베타 님한테 혼날 것 같은데…

1000695072.english: Haha, you're showing your dislike way too obviously. You need to control your expression.
1000695072.korean: 하하, 너무 노골적으로 싫어하는데? 표정 관리 좀 하라고.

1000695073.english: And even if Beta were to scold her, how much could she really scold her?
1000695073.korean: 그리고 베타가 혼낸다고 해 봐야 뭘 얼마나 혼내겠어?

1000695074.english: That's true, but... there could be a ban on snacks or walks...
1000695074.korean: 그거야 그렇지만… 간식이나 산책 금지령이 떨어질 수도 있다고요…

1000695075.english: If you don't like that, come to Poseidon. I'll make you walk until you die.
1000695075.korean: 그게 불만이면 포세이돈으로 오던가. 산책은 죽을 만큼 시켜 줄 테니까.

1000695076.english: Ugh, isn't that a march, not a walk?
1000695076.korean: 으으, 그건 산책이 아니라 행군 아니에요?

1000695079.english: If you don't like it, never mind.

1000695080.english: Well then, shall we head to Malta now?
1000695080.korean: 그럼, 우린 이만 몰타로 가 볼까?

1000695081.english: - I nodded and followed Gamma onto the small boat.
1000695081.korean: - 나는 고개를 끄덕이고, 감마를 따라 작은 보트에 올라탔다.

1000695082.english: - We boarded a boat painted with camouflage paint to avoid detection by radar and headed for Malta.
1000695082.korean: - 레이더에 걸리지 않도록 위장 도료로 칠해진 보트에 타고, 우리는 몰타로 향했다.

1000695083.english: - To the place that was once my home.

1000695084.english: - Gamma's combat power was truly incredible. She smashed them apart before the Marionettes could even react.
1000695084.korean: - 확실히 감마의 전투력은 대단했다. 마리오네트가 반응하기도 전에 녀석들을 박살 내버릴 정도였으니까.

1000695085.english: - After tearing through a whole group of Marionettes, Gamma muttered with a bored look.
1000695085.korean: - 마리오네트 한 무리를 박살낸 감마는, 시시하다는 표정으로 투덜댔다.

1000695086.english: Pathetic. Not even good for a warm-up.

1000695091.english: - Before my eyes appeared Alcyone, pinned down like an insect specimen, her hands and feet nailed into the ground.
1000695091.korean: - 내 눈앞에 나타난 건, 마치 곤충 표본처럼 손발이 땅에 못으로 고정된 알키오네 언니였다.

1000695092.english: - …Delta had done something so cruel, leaving her to suffer and die slowly.
1000695092.korean: - …델타는 언니가 고통받으며 천천히 죽어가도록… 이런 끔찍한 짓을 저지른 것이다.

1000695093.english: Nailed her limbs into the ground? That's sick… looks like Delta's handiwork.
1000695093.korean: 손발에 못을 박아 땅에 고정해 놓은 건가? 악취미인걸 보니… 델타가 한 짓이겠네.

1000695094.english: - I rushed to check her condition. Her body was covered in wounds, and a gunshot was clear on her forehead, but…
1000695094.korean: - 나는 달려가서 언니의 상태를 살폈다. 몸은 상처투성이였고, 이마에는 총상이 선명했지만…

1000695095.english: - Fortunately, the bullet had stopped at the skull, not penetrating the brain.
1000695095.korean: - 다행히 총알은 두개골에 막혀, 뇌까지 파고들지 않은 상태였다.

1000695096.english: - I desperately tried to pull out the nails from her limbs, but they were driven in so firmly I couldn't move them at all.
1000695096.korean: - 나는 필사적으로 언니의 손발에 박힌 못을 빼내려고 했지만, 못은 너무나도 단단히 고정된 나머지 내 힘으로는 미동조차 하지 않았다.

1000695097.english: Help me! We have to get her out!

1000695098.english: It's too late. She's got a bullet in her head.

1000695099.english: It's lodged in the skull! She's still alive!

1000695101.english: - Hearing my words, Gamma looked quite surprised.
1000695101.korean: - 내 말을 들은 감마는 꽤나 놀란 표정이었다.

1000695102.english: A sniper round stuck in her skull without penetrating? That's… impressive. At this rate, someone might stop a cannon shell with their head someday.
1000695102.korean: 권총탄도 아니고, 저격소총 탄환이 머리뼈에 막혔다고? 그거 참… 놀랍네. 이러다가 나중에는 머리로 포탄도 막는 녀석이 나올지도 모르겠어.

1000695103.english: - Gamma came closer to check Alcyone's condition, then shook her head.
1000695103.korean: - 가까이 와서 언니의 상태를 살핀 감마는 고개를 절레절레 저었다.

1000695104.english: She's bleeding way too much. She's alive for now, but she'll bleed out before you get her back to the ship.
1000695104.korean: 출혈이 너무 심한데? 지금이야 살아있지만, 배로 돌아가기 전에 출혈로 죽겠어.

1000695105.english: …No. We just need to go to Atlas as planned.

1000695106.english: - Atlas may be a device to heal the mind, but it can restore physical damage as well.
1000695106.korean: - 아틀라스는 정신을 치료하는 기기지만, 육체의 손상도 수복할 수 있으니까.

1000695107.english: So please, help me… I'm begging you.

1000695108.english: - Gamma thought for a moment, then nodded.
1000695108.korean: - 감마는 잠시 뭔가를 생각하다가 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000695109.english: …Fine. If she recovers, maybe I'll get the chance to fight her someday.
1000695109.korean: …뭐, 좋아. 나중에 이 녀석이 상태가 좋아지면 한 번 싸워볼 수도 있겠지.

1000695110.english: But don't forget. You owe me for this.
1000695110.korean: 하지만 잊지 마라. 넌 이걸로 내게 빚을 진 거니까.

1000695111.english: Now lead the way. To this Atlas machine.
1000695111.korean: 그럼 안내해 봐. 그 아틀라스라는 기계까지.

1000695112.english: - Fortunately, Gamma and I were able to arrive at Atlas before it was too late.
1000695112.korean: - 다행히, 감마와 나는 너무 늦지 않게 아틀라스에 도착할 수 있었다.

1000695113.english: - With Gamma's help, I opened Atlas's life support system and pushed my sister inside.
1000695113.korean: - 나는 감마의 도움을 받아 아틀라스의 생명유지장치를 열고, 언니를 그 안에 밀어 넣었다.

1000695114.english: … Done. Now, if I put my sister inside Atlas… Atlas will heal her.
1000695114.korean: …됐다. 이제 아틀라스 안에 언니를 넣으면… 아틀라스가 언니를 치료해 줄 거야.

1000695115.english: Certainly, with this, I won't die.

1000695116.english: Is it time to activate that Atlas now?

1000695118.english: - Before turning on Atlas, I looked at Gamma for a moment… then bowed my head low to Gamma.
1000695118.korean: - 아틀라스의 전원을 켜기 전, 나는 잠시 감마를 바라보다가… 감마에게 고개를 푹 숙였다.

1000695119.english: … Thank you. To be honest, I wouldn't have been able to get this far without your help.
1000695119.korean: …고마워. 솔직히 말해서, 당신이 도와주지 않았다면 여기까지 올 수 없었을 거야.

1000695120.english: Why are you acting like this? You're embarrassing me. I didn't even do this to hear a thank you.
1000695120.korean: 왜 이래, 사람 부끄럽게. 감사 인사를 들으려고 한 일도 아니었는데 말이야.

1000695121.english: Still... it is true that she helped me and my sister.
1000695121.korean: 그래도… 나랑 언니를 도와준 건 사실이니까.

1000695122.english: I really hate lemonade, but... I'll make an exception for you.
1000695122.korean: 레모네이드는 정말 싫지만… 당신은 예외로 해 줄게.

1000695123.english: Ha, you're talking like you're doing me a huge favor.
1000695123.korean: 하, 엄청나게 선심 쓴다는 듯이 말하는데?

1000695124.english: I've really been generous with this.
1000695124.korean: 이 정도면 크게 선심 쓴 거지.

1000695125.english: I… am going to get revenge on the other lemonades in the future.
1000695125.korean: 나는… 앞으로 다른 레모네이드들에게 복수할 거니까.

1000695127.english: … I haven't thought that far ahead yet.

1000695129.english: Well then, I was thinking of making a suggestion.
1000695129.korean: 그럼 내가 제안을 하나 할까 하는데.

1000695131.english: What do you think about becoming my adjutant?
1000695131.korean: 내 부관이 되는 것에 대해서 어떻게 생각하지?

1000695133.english: Yeah. It's like Secretary Lemonade's secretary.
1000695133.korean: 그래. 비서 레모네이드의 비서 같은 거야.

1000695134.english: Originally, I was supposed to have a staff member by my side to assist me…
1000695134.korean: 원래는 내 옆에서 날 보좌할 참모가 있어야 했는데…

1000695135.english: It just so happens that my staff was stationed in England.
1000695135.korean: 내 참모가 있던 곳이 하필이면 영국이었단 말이지.

1000695136.english: Why the UK? Is there a problem?

1000695137.english: There is a huge problem. There are disgustingly many Iron Bugs in the UK. In particular, the coastal defense forces are beyond imagination.
1000695137.korean: 아주 큰 문제가 있지. 영국에는 철충이 징그러울 정도로 많거든. 특히 해안선 방어 병력이 상상을 초월할 정도로 많아.

1000695138.english: Isn't that a good thing? I thought you were the type to go crazy for fighting.
1000695138.korean: 잘 된 거 아니야? 당신은 싸움이라면 환장하는 타입인 줄 알았는데.

1000695139.english: I do like fighting, but I don't like dying meaninglessly.
1000695139.korean: 내가 싸움을 좋아하긴 하지만, 무의미하게 뒈지는 걸 좋아하는 건 아니거든.

1000695140.english: I discovered records indicating that a tunnel connecting England and France was built in the very distant past, so I also considered the possibility of infiltrating by land, but...
1000695140.korean: 아주 먼 과거에 영국과 프랑스를 잇는 터널이 만들어진 적 있다는 기록을 발견해서, 육로를 통해 잠입하는 방법도 생각해 봤지만…

1000695141.english: The conclusion was that entry was impossible without Delta's assistance because the tunnel was so dilapidated.
1000695141.korean: 터널이 너무 노후화 된 탓에 델타의 조력 없이는 진입이 불가능하다는 결론만 나오더군.

1000695142.english: While searching for another way, the distress signal from the UK was cut off. The staff officer must have died in the UK.
1000695142.korean: 다른 방법을 찾던 도중, 영국에서 발신되는 구조 신호가 끊겼다. 아마 참모 녀석은 영국에서 죽어버린 거겠지.

1000695143.english: While I was running around here and there all by myself out of necessity… luckily, I found a pretty interesting guy.
1000695143.korean: 어쩔 수 없이 나 혼자 열심히 여기저기 뛰어다니던 도중에… 운 좋게도, 꽤 재밌는 녀석을 찾은 거야.

1000695144.english: I mean a guy who can devise decent strategies, has proven her field command abilities to some extent, and... can fight quite well even while injured.
1000695144.korean: 책략도 괜찮게 잘 짜고, 야전지휘능력도 어느 정도 입증한데다… 부상을 입은 상태로도 나쁘지 않게 싸울 수 있는 녀석 말이야.

1000695145.english: Of course, she still has some rookie sides... but well, time will take care of that.
1000695145.korean: 물론, 아직 애송이 같은 면이 있긴 하지만… 뭐, 그건 시간이 해결해 주겠지.

1000695146.english: … Where do you mean I look like a rookie?!

1000695147.english: Haha, well... the fact that I get defensive immediately if you just lightly scratch at me like this?
1000695147.korean: 하핫, 글쎄… 이렇게 슬쩍 긁으면 바로 발끈하는 점?

1000695150.english: Anyway, I actually liked you quite a bit. So I'll give you a chance to choose.
1000695150.korean: 아무튼, 난 네가 꽤 마음에 들었거든. 그러니까 선택을 할 기회를 주지.

1000695151.english: Are you going to join Poseidon or not?

1000695153.english: (Lemonade Gamma… Have you been observing me all this time?)
1000695153.korean: (레모네이드 감마… 여태까지 날 관찰하고 있던 건가.)

1000695154.english: (Even though she looks like she has nothing in her head but fighting, Secretary Lemonade... she really isn't someone to be taken lightly.)
1000695154.korean: (겉보기에는 싸움 외에는 머리에 든 게 없는 것 같아도, 역시 비서 레모네이드… 쉽게 볼 대상은 아니네.)

1000695155.english: … If I become your adjutant… what can I gain?
1000695155.korean: …만약 당신 부관이 된다면… 난 뭘 얻을 수 있지?

1000695156.english: The power of Poseidon Industries. And… what you want most.
1000695156.korean: 포세이돈 인더스트리의 힘. 그리고… 네가 가장 원하는 것.

1000695158.english: Right. I can tell just by looking into your eyes. You have eyes that crave revenge.
1000695158.korean: 그래. 네 눈빛만 봐도 알 수 있지. 넌 복수를 갈망하는 눈을 하고 있어.

1000695159.english: So, I will let you avenge your sisters.
1000695159.korean: 그러니 네 자매들의 복수를 할 수 있게 해 주마.

1000695160.english: Now that the Mermaids, the last remaining force resisting Delta in Europe, have been completely crushed, it is only a matter of time before Delta takes control of Europe.
1000695160.korean: 그나마 유럽에서 델타에게 저항하던 마지막 세력이었던 머메이드가 완전히 박살났으니, 델타가 유럽을 손에 넣는 건 시간문제일 뿐이야.

1000695161.english: … And once Delta conquers Europe, they will surely turn their gaze outward.
1000695161.korean: ….그리고 델타가 유럽을 정복하고 나면, 반드시 밖으로 시선을 돌리겠지.

1000695162.english: That's exactly it. Delta and I are bound to collide.
1000695162.korean: 바로 그거다. 델타와 나는 반드시 충돌할 수밖에 없단 말이야.

1000695163.english: I will hand over Delta's head to you then.
1000695163.korean: 그 때 델타의 목을 네게 넘겨주지.

1000695164.english: Of course, a clash with Delta won't happen in the short term. But I think this is a pretty satisfactory offer.
1000695164.korean: 물론, 델타와의 충돌이 단기간 내로 일어나지는 않을 거야. 하지만 이 정도면 꽤나 만족스러운 제안이라고 생각하는데?

1000695165.english: - I kept my mouth shut for a moment and thought about Gamma's suggestion.
1000695165.korean: - 나는 잠시 입을 다물고, 감마의 제안에 대해 생각했다.

1000695166.english: - The image of my older sister Alcyone, nailed to the ground and bleeding from her hands and feet, flashed through my mind.
1000695166.korean: - 손발에서 피를 흘리며 땅에 못박혀 있던 알키오네 언니의 모습이 뇌리를 스쳐 지나갔다.

1000695167.english: - The sight of Sister Maia throwing me overboard while bleeding, and the faces of the Mermaid sisters who lost their lives fighting Delta.
1000695167.korean: - 피를 흘리며 나를 배 밖으로 집어 던지던 마이아 언니의 모습과, 델타와 싸우다가 목숨을 잃은 머메이드 언니들의 얼굴도.

1000695168.korean: - 내가 내릴 수 있는 선택은 하나뿐이었다.

1000695170.english: Ha, it’s good that you’re quick to judge.

1000695171.english: … Please make sure to keep your promise.

1000695172.english: Don't worry, I never break a promise.
1000695172.korean: 걱정하지 마라, 난 약속을 어기는 법이 없으니까.

1000695173.english: - My heart wavered for a moment at words I never expected to hear here.
1000695173.korean: - 여기서 들을 거라고는 생각하지 못한 말에, 순간 마음이 흔들렸다.

1000695174.english: - … Let's not get the wrong idea. That's not my sister, that's Lemonade Gamma.
1000695174.korean: - …착각하지 말자. 저건 언니가 아니라 레모네이드 감마잖아.

1000695175.english: - This is strictly… just a relationship where we use each other until we deal with Lemonade Delta.
1000695175.korean: - 이건 어디까지나… 레모네이드 델타를 처리할 때까지 서로를 이용하는 관계일 뿐이야.

1000695176.english: … Then, I will proceed with the plan.

1000695177.english: Yeah. Go ahead and give it a try.
1000695177.korean: 그래. 어디 한 번 해 봐.

1000695178.english: - … I pressed the switch to power the Atlas.

1000695181.english: Detected nearby bio-units. Started ID scan.
1000695181.korean: 근처 생체 유닛 감지. ID 스캔 시작.

1000695182.english: ID identification complete. Regular ID 'Merope' belonging to Saman. Regular ID 'Lemonade Gamma' belonging to PECS detected.
1000695182.korean: ID 식별 완료. 삼안 소속의 정규 ID ‘메로페’. PECS 소속의 정규 ID ‘레모네이드 감마’ 감지.

1000695183.english: She's my guest. Please don't go on alert.
1000695183.korean: 내 손님이야. 경계 태세는 발동하지 말아 줘.

1000695184.english: Understood. I will register Lemonade Gamma as a guest.

1000695185.english: Hello, Meropé, Lemonade Gamma. How can I help you today?
1000695185.korean: 안녕하세요, 메로페, 레모네이드 감마. 오늘은 무엇을 도와드릴까요?

1000695186.english: Start the treatment process and maximize the scope of treatment.
1000695186.korean: 치료 프로세스 시작하고, 치료 범위를 최대로 넓혀.

1000695187.english: Until the entire island of Malta comes within the treatment range.
1000695187.korean: 몰타 섬 전체가 치료 범위 안에 들어올 때까지.

1000695188.english: Command confirmation. ATLAS executes the command.

1000695189.english: Sleeping gas is continuously produced until the raw materials run out, and the gas is released across the entire island using the ventilation system of the underground tunnel.
1000695189.korean: 수면가스는 원료가 다 떨어질 때까지 계속 생산하고, 지하 터널의 환기 시스템을 이용해서 섬 전역에 가스를 분출해.

1000695190.english: Command confirmation. ATLAS executes the command.

1000695191.english: It's time to go, Lieutenant. The marionettes are swarming in again.
1000695191.korean: 슬슬 갈 시간이다, 부관. 다시 마리오네트가 몰려오고 있어.

1000695193.english: Atlas… please take good care of my sister.

1000695196.english: If we stall any longer, this inner location will be exposed. Let's get out of here quickly.
1000695196.korean: 더 이상 시간을 끌면 이 안쪽 위치가 노출될 거다. 빨리 나가자고.

1000695197.english: Wait a minute, just one last time… please let me leave one message for my sister.
1000695197.korean: 잠깐만, 마지막으로… 언니에게 메시지 하나만 남기게 해 주세요.

1000695199.english: I'll buy you 10 minutes, so handle this quickly.

1000695200.english: … While my sister was asleep… these things happened.
1000695200.korean: …언니가 잠들어 있는 동안… 이런 일들이 있었어.

1000695201.english: … I’m going to leave Malta now, following Gamma. I probably… won’t be able to see you for a long time.
1000695201.korean: …난 이제 감마를 따라서 몰타 섬을 떠날 거야. 아마… 언니랑은 오랜 시간 만나지 못하게 되겠지.

1000695202.english: I'm sorry for leaving you like this. I'm sorry for leaving you here all alone. But...
1000695202.korean: 이렇게 놓고 가서 미안해. 여기 혼자 내버려둬서 미안해. 하지만…

1000695203.english: What I have to do from now on is an extremely dangerous job.
1000695203.korean: 앞으로 내가 할 일은 엄청나게 위험한 일이야.

1000695204.english: didn't want to see my sister get hurt again in the process.
1000695204.korean: 그 과정에서 언니가 다치는 걸 또 다시 보고 싶지는 않았어.

1000695205.english: I didn't want to put my sister in danger.

1000695206.english: So, sis... please wait for me.

1000695208.english: … with my sisters, and the mermaid sisters. And on behalf of those who died in Malta…
1000695208.korean: …언니들과, 머메이드 언니들. 그리고 몰타에서 죽어간 사람들을 대신해서…

1000695212.english: - What an ironic twist of fate. Merlin, who was meant to become Lemonade Gamma's staff officer, had joined Orca instead…
1000695212.korean: - 얄궂은 운명이었다. 레모네이드 감마의 참모가 될 예정이었던 멀린은 오르카에 합류한 상태고…

1000695213.english: - And Merope, Alcyone's younger sister, had become Gamma's adjutant.
1000695213.korean: - 알키오네의 동생인 메로페는 감마의 부관이 되어 있다니.

1000695215.english: Never thought I'd hear something like this.
1000695215.korean: 이런 정보를 얻게 될 줄은 몰랐네요.

1000695217.english: Yes. Gamma has never once brought an adjutant to a meeting.
1000695217.korean: 네. 감마는 단 한 번도 회의에 부관을 데려온 적이 없거든요.

1000695218.english: Hearing this, I think I understand why now.
1000695218.korean: 이 정보를 듣고 나니, 그 이유를 알 것 같네요.

1000695219.english: And if we think about it in this context…
1000695219.korean: 그리고, 이 정보를 토대로 생각해 본다면…

1000695220.english: Delta's strict counterintelligence net, and all her strange behavior up to now, finally make sense.
1000695220.korean: 델타가 그렇게 삼엄한 방첩망을 구성했던 이유와... 그 동안 보여준 이상한 행동들이 전부 이해가 되네요.

1000695221.english: Yes. Instead of establishing a forward base after occupying Malta, she scattered her forces across Europe to search for something, and even captured Bioroids belonging to Saman… all strange behavior.
1000695221.korean: 네. 몰타를 점령하고 전진기지조차 설치하지 않고, 병력을 유럽 여기저기로 파견해 뭔가를 찾거나, 삼안 소속의 바이오로이드들을 잡아들이는 등 이상한 행동을 보였는데…

1000695222.english: But hearing your story, it seems Delta thought Merope was behind Malta's abnormal incident.
1000695222.korean: 이야기를 들어보니, 아무래도 델타는 몰타의 이상사태를 일으킨 게 메로페라고 생각한 것 같아요.

1000695223.english: Because the body hasn't been found.

1000695224.english: Yes. So it seems she was obsessively searching for Merope.
1000695224.korean: 네. 그래서 편집증적으로 메로페를 찾고 있던 것 같네요.

1000695225.english: And no wonder. The losses at Malta were enormous.
1000695225.korean: 그럴 만도 하죠. 몰타에서 입은 손실이 엄청났으니까요.

1000695226.english: She mobilized an entire fleet just to take one tiny island, and after months, she still failed to occupy it, suffering massive losses in ships and troops.
1000695226.korean: 작디작은 섬 하나를 점령하느라 함대를 동원했는데, 몇 달 동안 점령에 성공하지도 못했고, 함선과 병력의 손실도 엄청났죠.

1000695227.english: It was a major incident that nearly shook Delta's hold on power.

1000695228.english: And to think, one of the commanders in that battle, Merope, is now Gamma's adjutant.
1000695228.korean: 그런데 그 공방전의 지휘관 중 하나였던 메로페가 감마의 부관이 되었을 줄이야.

1000695229.english: …It seems fighting Gamma won't be easy.

1000695231.english: - Her face was strange—like she was angry, but smiling, but also on the verge of tears.
1000695231.korean: - 알키오네는 화난 것 같기도, 웃는 것 같기도… 그리고 울 것 같기도 한 묘한 표정을 짓고 있었다.

1000695234.english: I'm happy she's alive, but I'm also angry.
1000695234.korean: 메로페가 살아 있어서 기쁘기도 한데, 화가 나기도 해.

1000695235.english: No one asked her to avenge me, so why did she have to do something so reckless?
1000695235.korean: 누가 복수해달라고 한 것도 아닌데, 왜 저렇게 위험한 짓을 하냔 말이야.

1000695236.english: …And in the end, she didn't even manage to get revenge on Delta.

1000695237.english: - After a moment of thought, Alcyone nodded with a firm expression.
1000695237.korean: - 잠시 고민하던 알키오네는 굳은 표정으로 고개를 끄덕였다.

1000695239.english: When the time comes to fight Gamma, will you take me along?
1000695239.korean: 감마랑 싸울 때, 나도 데려가 줄 수 있을까?

1000695240.english: I want to defeat Gamma, catch that fool Merope, and…
1000695240.korean: 감마를 쓰러뜨리고, 메로페 이 바보를 잡은 다음…

1000695241.english: Smack her tail until she finally comes to her senses.
1000695241.korean: 꼬리를 잔뜩 때려서 정신차리게 만들어 줘야 할 것 같아.

1000695242.english: …Just like Sister Maia used to do whenever I messed up.
1000695242.korean: …마이아 언니가 내가 사고 칠 때마다 그랬듯이 말이야.

1000695243.english: - What was the feeling hidden behind Alcyone's smile? Joy at the news of Merope's survival? Or fear of losing her sister again?
1000695243.korean: - 알키오네의 미소 뒤에 숨어있는 감정은 뭘까? 메로페의 생존 소식에 대한 기쁨? 아니면 동생을 다시 잃을지도 모른다는 두려움?

1000695244.english: - Whatever it was, my role was clear.
1000695244.korean: - 뭐가 되었던 간에, 내가 할 일은 간단했다.

1000695245.english: - Before we could face Gamma in a final battle, we had to uncover everything about Poseidon. Things had gone too far for this fight to end as a simple extermination.
1000695245.korean: - 감마와의 결전을 벌이기 전에, 포세이돈의 모든 걸 알아내야 했다. 일이 이렇게 된 이상… 감마와의 전투는 단순한 섬멸전으로 끝낼 수 없었으니까.

1000695246.english: - After all… sisters who had been reunited after so long shouldn't be torn apart again.
1000695246.korean: - 오랜 시간 끝에 다시 만난 자매를 갈라놓을 수는 없는 법이니까.

1000695249.english: Well then, it was delayed way too much because of Delta, but...

1000695250.english: Shall we start the joint training we promised a long time ago… no, the mock battle?
1000695250.korean: 옛날에 약속했던 합동훈련… 아니, 모의전을 시작해 볼까?

1000695251.english: Let's see, the Vice Captain and Neri seem ready...
1000695251.korean: 어디 보자, 부함장님이랑 네리는 준비된 것 같고…

1000695253.english: It looks like we're ready as well. But…
1000695253.korean: 저희도 준비가 끝난 것 같네요. 그런데…

1000695255.english: Ah, it's not exactly a problem...
1000695255.korean: 아, 문제라고 할 것 까지는 아니고…

1000695258.english: Thetis is in the ward right now.

1000695259.english: A ward? What do you mean...? Did you get injured in battle?
1000695259.korean: 병동이라니, 그게 무슨…? 혹시 전투 중에 다치신 건가요?

1000695261.english: Thetis... saw Ms. Leanne in a swimsuit, and decided she would seduce the Commander with her tanned skin too, so she lay in the sun for too long...
1000695261.korean: 테티스는 저… 리앤 씨가 수영복을 입은 모습을 보더니, 자기도 태닝 피부로 사령관을 유혹하겠다고 햇빛 아래에서 너무 오래 누워 있었다가…

1000695264.english: … Should I buy a cold drink and go visit her later?
1000695264.korean: …나중에 차가운 음료수라도 하나 사서 병문안이라도 가야 할까요?

1000695265.english: … No, if that happened, I’d actually want to die of embarrassment…
1000695265.korean: …아니, 그러면 오히려 부끄러워서 죽으려고 할 걸…

1000695266.english: … Anyway, let's talk about Thetis later…

1000695267.english: … Let's focus on training for now!

1000695269.english: Nothing happened! Ah~ honestly, it was such a peaceful, boring day.
1000695269.korean: 아무 일도 없었어! 아~ 정말이지 너무 평온하다 못해 지루한 하루였어.

1000695272.english: Oh, it's nothing. Marie just said she wanted to talk to you. That's all right, isn't it?
1000695272.korean: 아, 별 건 아니고… 마리가 너랑 얘기하고 싶다고 하길래. 괜찮지?

1000695274.english: (Don't you dare tell her something dangerous happened here!)
1000695274.korean: (절대 여기서 위험한 일이 있었다고 말하지 마!)

1000695278.english: But Marseille doesn't have a ship big enough to carry the entire Steel Line.
1000695278.korean: 마르세유에는 스틸라인 전원을 수송할 만큼 큰 배가 없잖아?

1000695281.english: Right. Actually, that's why we gathered everyone.

1000695282.english: You looked like you were bored.

1000695286.english: Well… for now, let's just finish what we were doing.
1000695286.korean: 글쎄… 일단 우리는 우리 일을 마저 끝내자.

1000695287.english: Okay. It'll scan the nearby terrain and tell us suitability.
1000695287.korean: 그래. 근처 지형을 스캔해서 적합도를 알려줄거야.

1000695288.english: …Why the tail, all of a sudden?

1000695290.english: Isn't running awkward with it? Doesn't seem great for guard duty.
1000695290.korean: 뛰기 불편해서 호위에는 안 좋지 않을까?

1000695292.english: Anyway, why'd you wrap your tail just now?
1000695292.korean: 아무튼, 갑자기 꼬리는 왜 감은 거야?

1000695294.english: You could just hold hands, you know?

1000695295.english: So, shall we head back now?

1000695296.english: You look like you've got something to say…

1000695298.english: Oh… you're here already. I'm fine.
